# Promote portal canvas view-glue (bridge + CanvasWrapper) to shared

## Context
Part of epic #12207 (foundation step 2). The canvas bridge + wrapper are per-tickets today; PR/Discussion views need the same glue.

## The Fix
Relocate `apps/portal/view/news/tickets/TimelineCanvas.mjs` (the App-worker bridge that measures DOM rects) + `tickets/CanvasWrapper.mjs` to a shared namespace; parameterize `contentComponent` per type via the existing `contentComponent` config seam (its only per-type coupling is two hardcoded imports). Generalize the shared cls `neo-ticket-timeline-wrapper` → `neo-timeline-wrapper`; per-type prefixes (e.g. `portal-news-tickets-*`) stay.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Tickets tab unchanged; the bridge + wrapper are reusable across content types via config.
- [ ] The `sections` store key + `.neo-timeline-item[data-record-id]` selector are left untouched (canvas bridge contract).

## Related
Epic #12207. Depends on the renderer-neutralization step (foundation 1).
